title: Smoky Slovakian Pappardelle Stir Fry
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired stir fry featuring smoky pappardelle and a variety of vegetables. This dish can be made in under 30 minutes and is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Pappardelle
ingredients.notes: Smoked pappardelle for added depth of flavor

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion, bell pepper, and carrots to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until tender.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the smoked pappardelle to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or basil, if desired.
